name: PIPER SANDLER COMPANIES
summary: . OVERVIEW Piper Sandler Companies is an investment bank and institutional securities firm, serving the needs of corporations, private equity groups, public entities, non-profit entities and institutional investors in the United States ("U.S.") and internationally.
